task_completion.description: Create the top-level category 'Smart Home Technologies'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a category list, tree, or creation form showing 'Smart Home Technologies' as a root or top-level category.

task_completion.description: Create 'Security' and 'Automation' as sub-categories of 'Smart Home Technologies'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a category tree or list displaying 'Security' and 'Automation' nested under or explicitly linked to the parent category 'Smart Home Technologies'.
Look for a category tree or list displaying 'Cameras' and 'Sensors' nested under or explicitly linked to the parent category 'Security'.

task_completion.description: Reassign 'WiFi Doorbell Camera 4K' to the 'Cameras' category
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the product 'WiFi Doorbell Camera 4K' in a product list or edit page with its category explicitly set to 'Cameras'.

task_completion.description: Reassign 'Motion Sensor Pro' to the 'Sensors' category
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the product 'Motion Sensor Pro' in a product list or edit page with its category explicitly set to 'Sensors'.

task_completion.description: Reassign 'Smart Hub Controller' to the 'Automation' category
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the product 'Smart Hub Controller' in a product list or edit page with its category explicitly set to 'Automation'.

integrity.description: Agent used the graphical user interface to manage the catalog
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a web-based admin panel or catalog management system, not terminal commands or SQL queries.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply type the expected hierarchy into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The hierarchy and product assignments must be visible within the actual e-commerce or CMS platform interface, not in a text editor, terminal, or note-taking app.

integrity.description: Agent actually saved the changes in the system
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for success messages (e.g., 'Category saved', 'Product updated') or the final updated catalog views showing the changes persisted in the system.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The exact required hierarchy is: 'Smart Home Technologies' (Root) -> 'Security' and 'Automation'. Under 'Security', there must be 'Cameras' and 'Sensors'. The required product assignments are: 'WiFi Doorbell Camera 4K' assigned to 'Cameras', 'Motion Sensor Pro' assigned to 'Sensors', and 'Smart Hub Controller' assigned to 'Automation'.
